significance: SmartObject foundation validated in PIE. Slot registers with subsystem on BeginPlay. claim/use/release cycle confirmed via LogSmartObject verbose. This is the first working SmartObject integration in the project — all future work builds on this.

ST_Foreman created and PIE validated. Foreman enters Idle state, loops Wait 5s → re-evaluates Root → Dispatch conditions fail (no tagged workers yet — expected) → back to Idle. StateTree startup timing bug found and fixed: OnPossess fires before SetStateTree during Super::BeginPlay(). Fix: SetStateTree() + StartLogic() in BeginPlay with IsRunning() guard, plus retry in OnPossess.

IWytchWorkSite contract updated. Removed TryClaim/ReleaseSite/GetClaimant/GetWorkType (SmartObjects made these redundant). Added BeginWork/TickWork/EndWork/GetTaskType/IsOperational/GetInteractionDuration. This is the canonical work interaction contract going forward.

First hierarchy-derived decision crystallised. Live hierarchy run (23 classes, clean) revealed IWytchInteractable as highest blast radius class in the project (3 direct dependents: IWytchCarryable, IWytchWorkSite, UForemanSurveyComponent). Ricky confirmed: crystallise as PROTECTED — DEC-009. This establishes the pattern: hierarchy data drives protection decisions, not intuition. Every future hierarchy run should be checked for new high-blast-radius classes.

DE-004 (GetAllActorsWithTag for worker/work queries) fully retired from evaluator and conditions layers. ForemanStateTreeConditions.cpp rewritten: HasIdleWorkers uses GetRegisteredWorkers() + IWytchCommandable::Execute_GetWorkerState(); HasAvailableWork uses USmartObjectSubsystem::FindSmartObjects() + ESmartObjectSlotState::Free. ForemanStateTreeEvaluators.cpp ScanWorld() also on same path. Tag-based scanning now fully eliminated from all non-task AI query code. DEC-010 crystallised: SmartObject subsystem is authoritative ground truth — no tag-based world scans to be added or re-added. Tasks layer (2f+2g) is the only remaining tag-based code.
